summary_en: 25.0M shares (8.0% of outstanding) acquisition authorized, up to ¥50.0B, via open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange, Jun 1 2026–Mar 31 2027. All acquired shares to be cancelled on Mar 31 2027.
title_en: Notice on decision of treasury stock acquisition and cancellation of treasury shares
translation_en_brief: AMADA Co., Ltd. (TSE Prime, code 6113) announced on May 14, 2026, that its board of directors resolved to acquire up to 25.0 million treasury shares (8.0% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum of ¥50.0 billion via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The acquisition period runs from June 1, 2026, to March 31, 2027. The company simultaneously resolved to cancel all acquired treasury shares effective March 31, 2027. The stated purpose is to suppress growth of net assets, improve capital efficiency, and enhance shareholder returns through flexible capital allocation.
